hooks.description: Fetch Discord messages received since the last poll and inject them as context (Layer 1 of discord-auto-pickup).
Catch up on Discord messages received while no session was active (Layer 2 of discord-auto-pickup).

hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); first=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | awk '{print $1, $2; exit}'); case "$first" in 'git commit'*|'git tag'*|'git log'*|'git show'*) exit 0 ;; esac; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(pip|pip3)[[:space:]]+(install|uninstall)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use uv (uv add / uv sync) instead of pip per CLAUDE.md"}'; exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*find[[:space:]]+/[^[:space:]/]'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"find must be rooted at ./ not / — scanning the whole disk is wasteful"}'; exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(black|flake8|isort)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"ruff covers Black/isort/flake8 — do not run them separately"}'; exit 0; fi; exit 0

p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *.py) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && uv run ruff format "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1; uv run ruff check --fix "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; esac; exit 0
printf 'Before claiming done: npm run ci:local (or /verify)\n'

hooks.description: Resume Claude if a Discord message arrived during this response (Layer 3 of discord-auto-pickup).
